ideation: This sequence will show the robot playing a banjo.  The right arm will mimic the strumming motion, while the left arm will hold the banjo in a comfortable position.  The movements will be smooth but expressive, emphasizing the musical aspect of the emoji.  I'll check the examples for range of motion and ensure the poses fit naturally with the robot's design. Frame 1 shows both arms in a neutral position, the left arm slightly forward, hand open as if ready to grasp the banjo. Frame 2: Left arm is holding the banjo, joint 1 rotated slightly inward and joint 2 pitched downward slightly. Right arm is raised, ready to strum. Frame 3: Right arm is strumming downward. Frame 4: Right arm is returning to the starting position for the next strum. Frame 5: Left arm is slightly adjusting its grip on the banjo.

frames.beat: left arm grasps the banjo, right arm poised
right arm strums a chord with flair
right arm returns for another strum
left arm adjusts grip, ready for more
